proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `age_years` is associated with higher `pfs_months`, estimated per one standard deviation increase in age after clinical adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years_z + clinical covariates: adjusted effect 1.7522 months of pfs_months (SE 0.0043, z 409.098, p=<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ecog_ps` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, estimated per one standard deviation increase in ECOG performance status after clinical adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: OLS: pfs_months ~ ecog_ps_z + clinical covariates: adjusted effect -0.7977 months of pfs_months (SE 0.0043, z -186.226, p=<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients without `stage_iv`, after clinical covariate adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: OLS: pfs_months ~ stage_iv + clinical covariates: adjusted effect -1.3588 months of pfs_months (SE 0.0086, z -157.843, p=<1e-250).
